name: NexCampus v2.4.0
changelog: CSS fix — only Code Lab tab uses flex layout, all other tabs restored to block
Code Lab now verifies DOM readiness and shows confirmation when loaded
Mind map canvas has visible cyan border + distinct background
Mind map shows ready notification on load with instructions
Global search — type + Enter to navigate to any tool
Weekly content delivery — auto-receives new guides/challenges/themes weekly
8 auto-graded Python challenges with instant pass/fail scoring
Procedural planet textures, lens flare, 900 stars for Solar System
